chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3738 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.15554/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 26.03.2025 Mr.Arshad Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondent. Learned counsel for the petitioner demonstrates from the record that this petition is squarely covered by Division Bench Judgment of this Court reported as 2023 PTD 567 (Wazir Ali Industries Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan & others), upheld by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Civil Petition No.2375 of 2023. Learned counsel states that the ratio of the above judgment is binding upon this Division Bench per the multiline principle. Learned counsel for the respondent department did not controvert the aforesaid. In view hereof this petition is also disposed of for the reasons and upon the same terms as the judgment mentioned supra. Judge Judge nasir
